category_sources: Official GitHub README says ff performs fuzzy completion for finding files.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README contains installation, examples, and usage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/silentbicycle/ff, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README and repository metadata describe fuzzy file finding and include C and Emacs Lisp sources.
source_facts.executables lists ff as a CLI executable.
